# Introduction {#sec-intro}

This is a book created from markdown and executable code.

See @knuth84 for additional discussion of literate programming.

## Literate Programming {#sec-literate}

The concept of literate programming was introduced by @knuth84.
For a deeper dive, see [the details chapter](details.qmd)[ and @sec-details]{.content-visible when-profile="online"}.
A concise overview is available in [the summary](summary.qmd#sec-overview), specifically @sec-overview.
